title: Synchrony Financial: Potential Upside Due To Large Shareholder Returns
text: Synchrony shares have fallen significantly as investors exit cyclical stocks amid recession worries. However, the US consumer is relatively well positioned with a strong labor market and low delinquency levels.

title: Latinx Executive Alliance Announces New Advisory Board
text: Nation's Top Latinx Executives Convene to Advance Latinx Talent in Corporate America The Alliance to Host October 4 th Webinar on Supporting Next Generation Latinx Leaders  via Sponsorship and Mentorship Group Provides Interactive Platform to Discuss Skills Development, Talent Retention,  and Mentoring NEW YORK , Sept. 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Latinx Executive Alliance (LEA), a coalition of executives and business leaders, announced a new advisory board, bringing together some of the nation's top executives across a diverse range of industries who are dedicated to the mission of advancing more Latinx business leaders to executive leadership roles in Fortune 1000 companies.

title: At Home and Synchrony Expand Rewards Program
text: DALLAS & STAMFORD, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #growth--— At Home and Synchrony announce an expanded At Home Rewards Program for the home décor retailer.

title: August Inflation Data Rattles Markets: What Lies Ahead?
text: A 5% drop in energy prices was more than offset by higher shelter, food and medical care prices.

title: Synchrony Financial Credit Card Deliquency Rate Up to 3.1% in August
text: Synchrony Financial on Monday (Sept. 12) reported a rate of credit card delinquencies as a percentage of receivables of 3.1% for August, the highest level in at least a year, in a filing with the Securities and Exchange Commission.

title: Synchrony to Participate in the Barclays Global Financial Services Conference

title: Synchrony (SYF) Renews Tie-Up to Pursue Technology Investments
text: Synchrony Financial (SYF) strengthens bond with Sleep Number for consumer payment choice upgrades and the extension of diversified financing options to its customers.

title: Synchrony Announces Resignation of Will Graylin from Board of Directors
text: STAMFORD, Conn. , Sept. 2, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Synchrony (NYSE: SYF), a premier consumer financial services company, today announced Will Graylin has resigned from its Board of Directors.

title: Sleep Number and Synchrony Renew Long-Term Partnership to Deliver Next Level Customer Experience
text: Building on a nearly 20-year relationship, the companies will leverage advanced insights and technology to drive consumer demand and growth MINNEAPOLIS and STAMFORD, Conn. , Sept. 1, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Synchrony (NYSE: SYF) and Sleep Number (Nasdaq: SNBR) announced that they have renewed their longtime financing partnership, which includes new joint investments from both industry leaders.
